1 Link your Google Sheet
📋 How to link: Open your Google Sheet → File → Share → Publish to web → select Entire Document → Publish. Then copy the browser URL and paste it here.
2 Sync Options
Full Table Sync
Replaces the entire Exterior Projects table with data from your sheet. All columns are rebuilt dynamically.
KPI Stats Only
Updates only the 5 KPI stat cards (total, completed, in progress, on hold, artists) from your sheet row counts.

⚙️ AI Innovation — Sync Configuration

Configure how AI Innovation data syncs with external sources. Auto-sync reads from your Google Sheet via the existing Sync Hub configuration. No separate setup needed — just create an AI_Innovation tab in your master sheet with these columns:

ID Initiative Name Department Category AI Tool Owner Status Progress Impact Notes Last Updated
